campbell.title: Campbell City Council — April 21, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss updating the tax rates that local businesses pay for their licenses in the city. Shannon Dragman from the finance department presented the proposed changes to these fees, and the council discussed the matter before making a decision.
keyTopics: Business license tax rate increases for fiscal year 2026
Finance department review and recommendations
Council deliberation and formal vote on new fee structure
Emergency preparedness office coordination

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to get community input on a new rule or policy. After listening to residents, they decided to move forward with the proposal and skip the usual first reading process to speed things up, with a plan to officially adopt it at their next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held to gather resident feedback
New ordinance fast-tracked for adoption
Final vote scheduled for next regular council meeting
First reading waived to expedite the process

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 21, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 21, 2026, to approve meeting minutes from earlier in the month and review the city's finances for February. The council also approved several construction contracts and agreements to keep town projects and services moving forward.
keyTopics: Approved previous meeting minutes and closed session records
Reviewed February 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized construction contracts with multiple vendors
Approved multi-year professional services agreements

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 29, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council met to organize their upcoming meeting schedules for May. They reviewed and finalized the agenda for their May 5th meeting, decided which items needed specific time slots, and then looked ahead at what topics would be discussed in their May 12th meeting. The council also reviewed public records from mid-to-late April.
keyTopics: Finalized May 5, 2026 council meeting agenda
Scheduled specific time slots for certain agenda items
Reviewed draft agenda for May 12, 2026 meeting
Processed public records from April 16-23, 2026

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 30, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met to approve meeting minutes and hear directly from residents during public comment. The main focus was reviewing and deciding on neighborhood grant requests for the 2026-27 budget year, including which community projects would receive city funding.
keyTopics: Neighborhood grant funding decisions for 2026-27 fiscal year
Public comment period - residents could speak to council directly
Review of previous meeting minutes
Community attendance at neighborhood meetings
Staff reports and council member updates

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 28, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special evening meeting on April 28, 2026, to interview candidates for various city boards and commissions. Residents had the opportunity to participate both in person and online to provide public comments.
keyTopics: Board and Commission candidate interviews
In-person public comment opportunity
Online participation option for residents
Special study session format

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 30, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council held a meeting on April 30, 2026 to review and approve meeting minutes from the Economic Development Committee's January and March sessions. Residents were also given an opportunity to speak publicly about any issues relevant to the committee's work.
keyTopics: Approval of January 29, 2026 Economic Development Committee minutes
Approval of March 27, 2026 Economic Development Committee minutes
Public comment period for residents on economic development matters

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council met to discuss allowing large promotional signs on buildings near Levi's Stadium during the 2026 FIFA World Cup, and to approve a new contract with the firefighters union covering 2026-2029. One item was withdrawn by staff before the meeting.
keyTopics: Large promotional signs (supergraphics) permitted temporarily around Levi's Stadium for World Cup 2026 events
New three-year contract agreement with Santa Clara firefighters and their union (Local 1171)
One agenda item was withdrawn before the council meeting

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 21, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on April 21, 2026, to vote on several important financial and development matters for the upcoming year. The council approved tax policies, reviewed the city's budget and development plans for 2026-27, discussed ways to address homelessness in Santa Clara County, and handled routine meeting business.
keyTopics: Tax Equity and Fiscal Responsibility Act reissuance
FY 2026-27 budget and development plan approval
User fees and service charges updates
Santa Clara County homelessness prevention initiative
City Council meeting schedule and minutes approval

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 29, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council held a meeting on April 29, 2026 to discuss several items including the election of new leadership positions and a major development proposal. The main focus was a request to subdivide a vacant 1-acre lot on Old Trace Road into 9 new single-family homes plus 7 smaller accessory apartments, connected by a new private street.
keyTopics: Subdivision proposal for 4103 Old Trace Road to create 9 new homes and 7 accessory units
Election of City Council Chair and Vice Chair
Director's report and meeting schedule updates
Environmental review exemption approved under state law
